Contact

Contact Atlantic Star Relocations

We’re easy to reach.

If you are planning a move, have an update about an existing job, or need help understanding the best next step, contact Atlantic Star Relocations. We keep communication clear, practical, and direct.

Tell us where you are moving from, where you are going, what needs to be moved, and whether you need packing, labor-only help, storage coordination, or full moving service.

Call (929) 249-2727 Email Us Request a Quote

Direct Contact

For the fastest response, call us or send your move details by email.

Phone (929) 249-2727
Email hello@atlanticstargroup.com
Based in Westchester County, New York
Service area NYC, Westchester, NJ, CT & Long Island

What can we help you with?

Choose the right contact path so we can respond with the correct information.

New moving quote

Send your move date, pickup and delivery locations, inventory, stairs or elevator details, and any packing needs.

Request a quote

Update an existing move

If something changed, include your name, move date, pickup address, and the update you need us to review.

Send an update

General questions

Ask about service areas, packing, labor-only moving, storage coordination, availability, or building requirements.

Call now

For a faster quote, include:

  • Preferred move date or date range
  • Pickup and delivery ZIP codes
  • Apartment, house, office, or storage move
  • Stairs, elevator, loading dock, or building rules
  • Inventory or photos of what needs to be moved
  • Packing, furniture protection, or labor-only needs

This form opens your email app. For a website-connected form, connect it later to your form provider or CRM.

Contact us for moving support across the Tri-State area.

Atlantic Star Relocations helps customers plan and coordinate moves with clear communication before, during, and after moving day.

Residential moving

Apartment moves, house moves, same-building moves, local moving, long-distance moving, and interstate relocation support.

Commercial moving

Office moving, small business relocation, furniture moving, packing support, and organized move-day coordination.

Packing & protection

Packing service, packing-only help, fragile item handling, furniture protection, disassembly, and reassembly support.

Storage coordination

Help with storage moves, pickup and delivery coordination, short-term storage planning, and warehouse-related logistics.

Ready to talk about your move?

Call Atlantic Star Relocations or send your details. We will review the information and help you understand the next step.

Call (929) 249-2727 Email hello@atlanticstargroup.com
